src: Generative AI Application Builder on AWS facilitates the development, rapid experimentation, and deployment of generative artificial intelligence (AI) applications without requiring deep experience in AI. The solution includes integrations with Amazon Bedrock and its included LLMs, such as Amazon Titan, and pre-built connectors for 3rd-party LLMs.
ja: AI の深い専門知識を必要とせず、生成 AI アプリケーションの開発・迅速な実験・デプロイを促進する AWS 上の Generative AI Application Builder。Amazon Bedrock およびその LLM（Amazon Titan など）との統合、サードパーティ LLM 向けのビルド済みコネクタを含む
